payload.answer: Stored minimal memory about a failed fetch (404 network error) for a possibly malformed URL.

entity_resolution.reason: URL appears malformed/unclear in input (missing punctuation like 'https://example.com'), so no stable entity_id can be assigned.

payload.intent: Record a failed article URL fetch for later troubleshooting

memory_cards.statement: Attempted to fetch article at https://examplecom/missing why (punctuation/format unclear) returned a 404 network error.

details: Created one atomic event memory card for the fetch failure.

repair_options: Normalize URL punctuation/format (e.g., confirm correct domain and slashes) before storing as a canonical identifier.
Capture full request URL and headers/status response from the fetch system logs.
Store error type separately (HTTP 404 vs network-level failure) if available.
